title: Position and Stacking
description: Fix the broken tooltip by correctly positioning it relative to its parent button using CSS positioning
html: I am a tooltip!

validationRules.message: The wrapper should have position: relative to establish a positioning context
The tooltip should be absolutely positioned
The tooltip should be horizontally centered with translateX(-50%)

hints.text: An absolutely positioned element positions itself relative to its nearest positioned ancestor. The parent needs to establish that context.
Change the wrapper from 'position: static' to 'position: relative'. Change the tooltip's 'bottom: -30px' to 'bottom: 100%' to place it above.
.btn-wrapper { position: relative; } .tooltip { position: absolute; bottom: 100%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
